title: Method for accelerating water evaporation
abstract: Our method aims at accelerating the evaporation of water. In a metal frame (1) we place plastic sheets, interior (2) and exterior (3). Fans (10) inflate the outer plastic sheet. A perforated tube (5) fitted with injectors (6) is placed between the two plastic sheets. Pump (11) transfers the water to be evaporated in the perforated pipe and at the same time an air compressor (9) supplies pressurized air into the perforated tube. The water passes through the injectors and diffuses in the form of a cloud in the space between the two plastic sheets. The high temperature we have between the plastic sheets and the air flow created by the fans, evaporate the water and the vapors escape to the environment. An automated electronic programmer automation (PLC) controls the conditions prevailing in our system and appropriately modifies the operation of the fans and pumps.
claims: Claims 1 ) A method of accelerating the evaporation of water characterized by the use of plastic sheets (2) & (3), covering a metal frame (1 ), use of a perforated tube (5) within the space of the two plastic sheets, use of an air compressor (9), use of pumps (8) & (1 1 ), use of a gutter (7), use of injectors (6) and use of an automatic programmer (PLC) 2) Process for accelerating the evaporation of waters according to claim 1 , characterized in that the perforated tube (5) is charged with the water to be evaporated by means of a pump (1 1 ). 3) A method for accelerating the evaporation of water according to claim 1 characterized in that the air compressor (9) introduces pressurized air into the perforated tube (5) filled with the water to be evaporated. 4) A method for accelerating the evaporation of water according to claim 1 characterized in that the fans (10) introduce air into the space between the two plastic sheets creating a suitable air stream. 5) A method for accelerating the evaporation of water according to claim 1 characterized in that the gutter (7) collects any water which has not evaporated and, via pump (8), is re-introduced into the process. 6) A method for accelerating the evaporation of water according to claim 1 characterized in that the PLC reads the prevailing conditions and modifies the speed of the fans and pumps accordingly. 7) A method for accelerating the evaporation of water according to claim 1 characterized in that in case we want to avoid unpleasant odors we add ozone to the space between the two plastic sheets and place active carbon filters on the vapor outlets.
